subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond all mention and limitation, beseemeth the Lord of the invisible and the visible, Who hath caused the hearts and souls of His chosen ones to be illumined [3.5s]... ...The Kitab-i-Iqan was revealed in 'Iraq especially for the honored Afnan, the illustrious Khal Akbar, upon him rest all My Glory. The details are thus
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و حدود مالک غیب و شهودیرا لایق و سزاست که افئده و قلوب اولیا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
